flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mississippi State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.9k → $27.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mississippi State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mississippi State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mississippi State University rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (36.3% → 45.9%).
